posts.author: spyros.savvides (Spyros Savvides)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

I was wondering if there is a capacity planning board within the dev workspace where I can define capacity of each team member against Sprint time so that I can know when I’m over allocating or under allocating work for each resource.
